response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned generalist with genuine geospatial domain exposure through GISCollective and Green Map, plus systems-level low-latency experience in DLang at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second. However, modern C++ experience is thin and dated (a brief 2014–2015 stint at National Instruments), there is no Rust experience, and no direct work on routing engines, map tiling, or navigation guidance pipelines. Recent roles have been web/full-stack TypeScript, which is distant from the core requirements of this role.
strengths: Geospatial platform experience via GISCollective and Green Map GIS applications
Low-latency distributed systems work in DLang (async I/O, caching, high-throughput microservices)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing culture, and open-source contributions
concerns: Minimal and dated professional C++ experience; no Rust
No direct routing, map tiling, or navigation guidance pipeline experience
Recent focus is web/full-stack TypeScript, far from systems-level pipeline work
